roadmap.title: White Orchard and early Velen counters
roadmap.description: Start on Death March, never lower combat difficulty, activate White Orchard's five Places of Power, and begin every cumulative combat, alchemy, reading, and exploration counter.

roadmap.title: Protect base-game missables before Isle of Mists
roadmap.description: Complete Keira, Triss, Roche, Skellige ruler, Radovid, racing, fistfight, contract, and Gwent routes. Recruit all seven required allies and clear every regional Gwent count before the cutoff.

roadmap.title: Finish the main story on Death March
roadmap.description: Enter the Isle of Mists only after stage-two checks, finish the Wild Hunt story without changing difficulty, then lower difficulty for any remaining base-game counter cleanup.

roadmap.title: Hearts of Stone with quest saves
roadmap.description: Make saves before the wedding, auction, painted memories, and six-nightmare fight. Clear every Order camp and assemble the complete Ofieri inventory.

roadmap.title: Blood and Wine branch reloads and cleanup
roadmap.description: Save before Golyat, the tourney, the vineyard hand-ins, and the Little Flint Girl. Run both ending branches, collect all Grandmaster diagrams and Skellige cards, then finish the remaining Toussaint counters.

achievements.description: Find Yennefer of Vengerberg.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Find Yennefer and complete Lilac and Gooseberries in White Orchard.

guide.context: This is the first automatic story achievement and cannot be missed while advancing the main quest.

steps.text: Investigate White Orchard with Vesemir, defeat the royal griffin, and meet Yennefer at the inn's conclusion.

achievements.description: Find and free Dandelion.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Rescue Dandelion by completing A Poet Under Pressure.

guide.context: Dandelion's rescue closes the Novigrad search arc after Get Junior and the related investigation quests.

steps.text: Complete the Novigrad main quests until A Poet Under Pressure starts, pursue the kidnappers, free Dandelion, and finish the quest.

achievements.description: Help Yennefer extract information from Skjall's body.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Help Yennefer question Skjall's corpse during Nameless.

guide.context: This is an automatic Skellige-story event after the Freya's Garden investigation reaches Skjall's body.

steps.text: During Nameless, follow Yennefer into the garden, locate Skjall's corpse, and complete the necromancy sequence.

achievements.description: Find the baron's wife and daughter.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Find Anna and Tamara during the Bloody Baron's Family Matters questline.

guide.context: The achievement follows the Velen investigation; later choices can change the family's outcome but not the unlock once both women are found.

steps.text: Progress Family Matters, locate Tamara in Oxenfurt, follow the Crones trail to Anna in Crookback Bog, and report the findings to the Baron.

achievements.description: Find Ciri.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Find Ciri on the Isle of Mists.

guide.context: Starting The Isle of Mists is a major cutoff that fails many unfinished secondary quests, so complete missable base-game work before sailing there.

steps.text: Finish the Brothers in Arms preparations, sail to the Isle of Mists, rescue the three dwarves needed to open the hut, and complete the reunion with Ciri.

achievements.description: Visit Tir ná Lia and convince Ge'els to betray Eredin.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Through Time and Space and secure Ge'els's help against Eredin.

guide.context: This late-story quest moves through several worlds with Avallac'h before the meeting at Tir ná Lia.

steps.text: Follow Avallac'h through every portal in Through Time and Space, reach Tir ná Lia, present the evidence to Ge'els, and finish the quest.

achievements.description: Defeat Eredin.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Eredin during On Thin Ice and finish the main story.

guide.context: Eredin is the final mandatory boss; the difficulty achievements evaluate the save after the ending sequence.

steps.text: Complete On Thin Ice, defeat Eredin through all phases, and continue through the epilogue until the ending is recorded.

achievements.description: Finish the game on any difficulty.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Finish the main story on any difficulty.

guide.context: This stacks with both higher-difficulty achievements when the entire save has remained on Death March.

steps.text: Defeat Eredin, complete the epilogue, and wait for the ending to register.

achievements.description: Finish the game on the "Blood and Broken Bones!" or "Death March!" difficulty levels.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete the main story without reducing a save begun on either qualifying difficulty: Death March or Blood and Broken Bones.

guide.context: Changing below the selected qualifying difficulty at any point invalidates the finish; Death March also awards Walked the Path.

steps.text: Begin a new save on Death March or Blood and Broken Bones, keep that combat setting unchanged, then defeat Eredin and complete the epilogue.

achievements.description: Finish the game on the "Death March!" difficulty level.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Finish the entire main story on Death March without ever lowering the difficulty.

guide.context: A New Game Plus save qualifies if Death March is selected at creation and remains unchanged; Gwent difficulty is separate.

steps.text: Choose Death March before the opening tutorial, ignore every prompt to lower difficulty, defeat Eredin, and complete the epilogue.

achievements.description: Complete every base-game witcher contract.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete the 25 base-game witcher contracts counted by Geralt: The Professional.

guide.context: The counter covers 11 Velen, eight Novigrad, and six Skellige contracts; expansion contracts do not replace missing base-game entries.

steps.text: Take every contract notice in Velen, Novigrad, and Skellige, complete each investigation and monster fight, and return to each issuer when the quest requires a report.

achievements.description: Complete the subplot about choosing Skellige's ruler.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Complete Possession, The Lord of Undvik, King's Gambit, and Coronation to choose Skellige's ruler.

guide.context: Walking away during King's Gambit leaves Svanrige as ruler and blocks Hjalmar from Full Crew.

steps.text: Finish Possession and The Lord of Undvik, then choose to help Cerys or Hjalmar during King's Gambit and complete Coronation.

achievements.description: Take part in the assassination of King Radovid.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Complete Reason of State and participate in Radovid's assassination.

guide.context: The route closes if its prerequisite quests are unfinished before The Isle of Mists or if Geralt forcefully dismisses Dijkstra during Blindingly Obvious.

steps.text: Before The Isle of Mists, complete Redania's Most Wanted, An Eye for an Eye, A Matter of Life and Death, Now or Never, and A Deadly Plot.
During Blindingly Obvious, resolve the Philippa confrontation without shoving Dijkstra aside; accept and complete Reason of State after the Battle of Kaer Morhen.

achievements.description: Complete Keira Metz's subplot.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Complete Keira Metz's Velen subplot through For the Advancement of Learning.

guide.context: Sending Keira to Kaer Morhen preserves her for Full Crew; killing her or allowing the Radovid route removes that ally.

steps.text: After An Invitation from Keira Metz, finish A Towerful of Mice and A Favor for a Friend before concluding For the Advancement of Learning.
At Fyke Isle, choose the dialogue that persuades Keira to go to Kaer Morhen.

achievements.description: Bring every required ally to Kaer Morhen.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Recruit Keira, Triss, Roche, Ves, Zoltan, Ermion, and Hjalmar before entering the Isle of Mists.

guide.context: The achievement checks these seven allies at Kaer Morhen; Letho, Dijkstra, Crach, Folan, Vigi, and Emhyr are not required.

collectibles.name: Keira Metz
collectibles.method: Finish Keira's four-quest subplot and persuade her to go to Kaer Morhen.

collectibles.name: Triss Merigold
collectibles.method: Finish A Matter of Life and Death, then complete Now or Never; at the harbor, ask Triss to stay and tell her that Geralt loves her.

collectibles.name: Roche
collectibles.method: Complete An Eye for an Eye, then recruit Roche during Brothers in Arms: Novigrad.

collectibles.name: Ves
collectibles.method: Keep Ves alive in An Eye for an Eye; Roche brings her with him.

collectibles.name: Zoltan Chivay
collectibles.method: Ask Zoltan for help during Brothers in Arms: Novigrad.

collectibles.name: Ermion
collectibles.method: Ask Ermion for help during Brothers in Arms: Skellige.

collectibles.name: Hjalmar
collectibles.method: Complete the ruler subplot, then recruit Hjalmar through the crowned sibling during Brothers in Arms: Skellige.

achievements.description: Acquire all the Abilities in one tree.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Invest at least one ability point in every ability of one skill tree.

guide.context: General is the smallest tree and is usually the cheapest route; points may be reassigned later with a Potion of Clearance.

steps.text: Earn enough ability points, open Character, and buy the first rank of every ability in a single tree until no node in that tree remains unlearned.

achievements.description: Use the Axii Sign to force one opponent to kill another. Do this 20 times.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Use Puppet Axii to make an opponent kill another opponent 20 times.

guide.context: Only kills delivered by the temporarily allied target count; weakening the intended victim first makes credit more reliable.

steps.text: Unlock and equip Puppet in the Signs tree, hold Axii on one enemy until the alternate cast completes, weaken a second enemy, and let the puppet land the killing blow; repeat for 20 credited kills.

achievements.description: Kill 10 opponents by knocking them off somewhere high with the Aard Sign.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill 10 opponents by knocking them from a high ledge with Aard.

guide.context: Fall damage must deliver the kill; Devil's Pit offers repeatable bandits near a steep entrance ledge.

steps.text: Lure human enemies to a cliff or battlement, position Geralt between them and safe ground, cast Aard toward the drop, and repeat until 10 falls are lethal.

achievements.description: Kill 50 opponents using the environment (e.g. swamp gas, insects or objects).
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill 50 opponents with environmental hazards such as barrels, swamp gas, insects, or loose objects.

guide.context: Weapon and Sign damage may weaken targets, but the environmental explosion or hazard must deliver the final damage.

steps.text: Draw low-health enemies beside explosive barrels or into swamp gas, ignite the hazard with Igni, and accumulate 50 hazard kills.

achievements.description: Perform 10 effective counterattacks in a row without getting hit or parrying.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Land 10 consecutive counterattacks without being hit or merely parrying.

guide.context: A lone sword-wielding human is safer than monsters; a failed timing or incoming hit resets the streak.

steps.text: Isolate a swordsman, press block immediately before each swing so Geralt counters, avoid attacking between counters, and complete 10 successful counters in one uninterrupted sequence.

achievements.description: Kill 5 foes in a fight without taking damage (except for Toxicity) and without using the Quen Sign.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill five foes in one fight without taking damage or using Quen.

guide.context: Toxicity damage is explicitly allowed, but any enemy or environmental damage invalidates the fight.

steps.text: Find a pack of low-level wolves near Hanged Man's Tree, leave Quen unequipped, dodge or block every attack, and kill five members of the same encounter without taking damage.

achievements.description: Ignite the gas produced by a Dragon's Dream bomb using a burning opponent. Do this 10 times.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Ignite Dragon's Dream gas with a burning opponent 10 times.

guide.context: The enemy must already be burning when the bomb's gas is ignited; bomb charges replenish through meditation when strong alcohol is available.

steps.text: Buy and craft Dragon's Dream, set an enemy burning with Igni, immediately throw Dragon's Dream into the burning target, and repeat the gas explosion 10 times.

achievements.description: Fill all mutagen slots.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Equip mutagens in all four mutagen slots on the Character screen.

guide.context: The fourth slot opens through leveling, so this cannot be completed at the start even if four mutagens are owned.

steps.text: Reach the level that unlocks all four mutagen sockets, open Character, and place any mutagen into each socket.

achievements.description: Kill at least 5 opponents in under 10 seconds.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill five opponents within 10 seconds.

guide.context: A weak clustered pack lets Igni or fast attacks start the timer and finish every target before the window closes.

steps.text: Gather at least five low-level wolves near Hanged Man's Tree, group them in front of Geralt, and kill all five within one 10-second burst.

achievements.description: Kill three opponents with three different methods in one fight.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill three opponents in one fight using three different methods.

guide.context: The methods can be a sword, Sign, bomb, crossbow, or environmental hazard; each method must deliver a separate kill before combat ends.

steps.text: Start one encounter with at least three weak foes, kill one with Igni, one with a sword, and one with a crossbow or bomb before leaving combat.

achievements.description: Defeat Olaf, the Skellige champion of unarmed combat.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Defeat Olaf during Fists of Fury: Champion of Champions.

guide.context: Olaf becomes available after the three Skellige regional fistfights and the Final Fight progression.

steps.text: Win the fights at Kaer Trolde, Arinbjorn, and Harviken, complete Final Fight, travel to Urialla Harbor, then dodge and counter Olaf until he is defeated.

achievements.description: Make an opponent suffer from bleeding, poisoning and burning simultaneously. Do this 10 times.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Make 10 opponents bleed, burn, and suffer poison at the same time.

guide.context: All three status icons must overlap on one living target for each credit; armored or resistant enemies can prevent an effect.

steps.text: Against a durable bandit, fire a Broadhead Bolt for bleeding, throw Devil's Puffball for poison, and throw Dancing Star or cast Igni for burning before either earlier effect expires; repeat on 10 opponents.

achievements.description: Kill 50 human and nonhuman opponents by striking them in the head with a crossbow bolt.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill 50 human or nonhuman opponents with crossbow headshots.

guide.context: A head hit is insufficient unless the bolt delivers the killing blow; Lightning Reflexes slows aiming and makes the repeated shots more consistent.

steps.text: Weaken a human enemy, use Axii to hold the target still, aim the crossbow at the bowed head, and deliver the final hit with the bolt; repeat for 50 credited headshot kills.

achievements.description: Perform an attack, counter, Sign, and bomb throw within four seconds.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Within four seconds, throw a bomb, cast a Sign, attack, and execute a counterattack.

guide.context: The four actions may occur in any order, but the same living enemy must keep the sequence in combat.

steps.text: Equip a bomb before combat, throw the bomb at a durable swordsman, cast Igni, perform a fast attack, and counter the next swing before four seconds elapse.

achievements.description: Kill 2 monsters you have a contract on without using Signs, potions, mutagens, oils or bombs.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Kill the target monsters in two witcher contracts without Signs, potions, mutagens, oils, or bombs.

guide.context: The restriction applies to the contract monster fights; remove mutagens before combat and do not use forbidden preparations during either qualifying contract.

steps.text: Before the first contract boss, unequip every mutagen and oil and avoid Signs, potions, and bombs until the monster dies and the contract completes.
Complete a second contract under the same restrictions before exhausting the finite base-game contract list.

achievements.description: Discover 100 fast travel points.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Discover 100 fast-travel signposts.

guide.context: A signpost counts when its location name appears; using the signpost is unnecessary.

steps.text: Explore Velen, Novigrad, Skellige, White Orchard, and Kaer Morhen, approach undiscovered signposts, and continue until 100 locations register.

achievements.description: Destroy all monster nests in the Velen / Novigrad region, or in Skellige.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Destroy every monster nest in either Skellige or the combined Velen–Novigrad region.

guide.context: Skellige is shortest with five nests; each nest requires a compatible bomb after the guarding monsters die.

steps.text: Reveal Skellige's five nest icons, kill the monsters at each site, and use Grapeshot, Samum, or Dancing Star at every nest until all five are destroyed.

achievements.description: Acquire all gwent cards available in the base version of the game.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Complete Collect 'Em All by owning all 120 unique base-game Gwent cards.

guide.context: Expansion cards do not count. Cards from A Matter of Life and Death, A Dangerous Game, High Stakes, and disappearing players can be permanently missed.

steps.text: Buy every merchant and innkeeper card, defeat ordinary card-giving players in every region, and finish Skellige Style, Old Pals, Big City Players, Velen Players, and Playing Innkeeps.

Win all three Vegelbud Estate matches during A Matter of Life and Death, choose the cards at the end of A Dangerous Game, save and win every High Stakes match, and use A Miraculous Guide to Gwent to clear each remaining regional count.

achievements.description: Defeat Tybalt and win the gwent tournament held at the Passiflora.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Win every High Stakes match and defeat Tybalt at the Passiflora tournament.

guide.context: Losing a match fails the tournament permanently, so make a manual save before entering and between every round.

steps.text: Build a strong deck, accept High Stakes at the Passiflora, win all tournament matches without accepting a loss, defeat Tybalt in the final, and finish the quest.

achievements.description: Learn 12 potion formulae.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Learn 12 distinct potion formulae.

guide.context: Formula manuscripts count when learned; crafting or drinking the resulting potion is unnecessary.

steps.text: Loot alchemy manuscripts and buy missing potion formulae from herbalists until 12 different potion recipes appear in Alchemy.

achievements.description: Collect the formulae for 6 different bomb types.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Learn formulae for six different bomb types.

guide.context: Enhanced and Superior upgrades do not substitute for six base bomb categories.

steps.text: Visit the Herbalist's Hut southeast of Novigrad, buy six different base bomb formulae, and read or learn every manuscript.

achievements.description: Read 30 books, journals or other documents.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Read 30 different books, journals, letters, or documents.

guide.context: Looting a document is insufficient until it is opened or marked read in the inventory.

steps.text: Loot written documents throughout quests, buy books from Novigrad's Hierarch Square bookseller, open each unread entry, and reach 30 unique reads.

achievements.description: Find and equip all the elements of one set of witcher gear.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Craft and equip every piece of one complete witcher gear set.

guide.context: The basic Griffin set is a compact option with armor, trousers, gauntlets, boots, steel sword, and silver sword in Velen.

steps.text: Complete Scavenger Hunt: Griffin School Gear, take all six diagrams to suitable armorers and blacksmiths, craft every piece, then equip all six simultaneously.

achievements.description: Have all possible Place of Power bonuses active at the same time.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Activate the Aard, Axii, Igni, Quen, and Yrden Places of Power before any 30-minute bonus expires.

guide.context: White Orchard contains one stone for each Sign, and fast travel does not cancel the active bonuses.

collectibles.name: Aard
collectibles.method: Draw from the Aard Place of Power and move immediately to the next stone.

collectibles.name: Axii
collectibles.method: Draw from the Axii Place of Power and move immediately to the next stone.

collectibles.name: Igni
collectibles.method: Draw from the Igni Place of Power and move immediately to the next stone.

collectibles.name: Quen
collectibles.method: Draw from the Quen Place of Power and move immediately to the next stone.

collectibles.name: Yrden
collectibles.method: Draw from the Yrden Place of Power and move immediately to the next stone.

achievements.description: Complete all fistfighting quests in Velen, Skellige and Novigrad.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete every Fists of Fury quest in Velen, Novigrad, Skellige, and the champion finale.

guide.context: Each regional champion opens after its three preliminary opponents; the final champion requires the Skellige haunted-arena side quest.

steps.text: Win the three preliminary fights and champion fight in Velen, repeat the four-fight chains in Novigrad and Skellige, resolve Master of the Arena, then win Champion of Champions.

achievements.description: Win all the horse races in the game.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Win all 11 base-game horse races: three in Velen, four in Novigrad, and four in Skellige.

guide.context: Finish Get Junior to unlock the Novigrad derby; its three Vegelbud opponents lead to Cleaver's Palio, which supplies Novigrad's fourth required win.

collectibles.name: Crow's Perch series
collectibles.method: Win all three opponents in Races: Crow's Perch.

collectibles.name: Vegelbud derby heats
collectibles.method: Win the first three races in Race: The Great Erasmus Vegelbud Memorial Derby.

collectibles.name: Palio
collectibles.method: Read Cleaver's invitation, make a manual save, and win the fourth Novigrad race.

collectibles.name: Kaer Trolde
collectibles.method: Win The Heroes' Pursuits: Kaer Trolde.

collectibles.name: Fyresdal
collectibles.method: Win The Heroes' Pursuits: Fyresdal.

collectibles.name: Fayrlund
collectibles.method: Win The Heroes' Pursuits: Fayrlund.

collectibles.name: For the Goddess' Glory
collectibles.method: Win the final Heroes' Pursuits race.

achievements.description: Reach character development level 35.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Reach character level 35.

guide.context: Main quests, secondary quests, contracts, and expansion content all award experience toward the same level.

steps.text: Complete story quests near their recommended level, clear contracts and side quests, and continue until Geralt reaches level 35.

achievements.description: Destroy 10 monster nests using bombs.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Destroy 10 monster nests with bombs.

guide.context: Only the final bomb interaction at a cleared nest advances the counter.

steps.text: Kill the monsters guarding a nest, stand at the marked nest, use the Destroy prompt with Grapeshot, Samum, or Dancing Star, and repeat at 10 nests.

achievements.description: Defeat an opponent in a fistfight without taking any damage.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Win a fistfight quest without taking any damage.

guide.context: Blocking and countering prevent damage; a manual save before an early Velen bout allows an immediate retry.

steps.text: At Velen's Inn at the Crossroads, join the available fistfight, block or dodge every punch, counter with heavy strikes, and win with Geralt's health unchanged.

achievements.description: Win a round of gwent using only neutral cards.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Win a Gwent round using only neutral unit cards.

guide.context: Weather, leader, and special cards do not satisfy the unit restriction; every scored unit in the winning round should be neutral.

steps.text: Build a deck containing several neutral units, play only neutral units in one round, score more points than the opponent, and win that round.

achievements.description: Play three hero cards in one round of gwent and win the match.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Play three hero cards in one Gwent round and win the match.

guide.context: The match, not merely the hero-card round, must end in victory.

steps.text: Add at least three hero cards to one deck, draw and play all three in the same round, then win the overall match.

achievements.description: Complete the contract on the shrieker.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Contract: Shrieker from the Crow's Perch notice board.

guide.context: The achievement is awarded by the named contract, not by killing an unrelated cockatrice.

steps.text: Take Contract: Shrieker at Crow's Perch, investigate the attack, drive the shrieker from its cave with a bomb, kill it, and report to Chet.

achievements.description: Complete the contract on Sarasti.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete The Mystery of the Byways Murders and kill Sarasti.

guide.context: The contract begins around Byways in Velen; the named ekimmara must be killed and the quest resolved.

steps.text: Investigate Byways, uncover the tunnels beneath the village, kill Sarasti, and finish the contract dialogue.

achievements.description: Complete the contract on the Woodland Spirit.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Side with Sven during In the Heart of the Woods and kill the Woodland Spirit.

guide.context: Harald's ritual resolution completes the quest without awarding this achievement.

steps.text: Start In the Heart of the Woods in Fayrlund, investigate the marked forest areas, and read the Woodland Spirit bestiary entry.
Reject Harald's pact renewal, accept Sven's offer to destroy the spirit, follow the contract trail, and kill the ancient leshen.

achievements.description: Complete the contract on Morvudd.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Contract: Missing Son and kill Morvudd.

guide.context: The named fiend requires two encounters before the contract can be reported.

steps.text: Take Missing Son near Rannvaig, investigate the ruins, fight Morvudd, track the wounded fiend to its lair, kill it, and return to Odhen.

achievements.description: Complete the contract on Therazane.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Contract: Doors Slamming Shut and kill Therazane.

guide.context: The contract begins from Contract: Haunted House on a Novigrad notice board and ends only after reporting back.

steps.text: Take the notice near St. Gregory's Bridge or Hierarch Square, investigate the mansion cellar, kill Therazane, and return to Kurt Dysart.

achievements.description: Resolve the doppler problem in Novigrad.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Contract: An Elusive Thief and resolve the Novigrad doppler case.

guide.context: Killing or sparing the doppler can finish the contract, but the investigation and final report must be completed.

steps.text: Take Contract: Imp at Hierarch Square, follow the market tracks, read the house letter, defeat the doppler, choose the outcome, and report to the merchant.

achievements.description: Kill the Toad Prince.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill the Toad Prince and complete Evil's Soft First Touches.

guide.context: This is the opening Hearts of Stone story achievement.

steps.text: Accept the Olgierd contract at Seven Cats Inn, enter the Oxenfurt sewers, kill the Toad Prince, and finish Evil's Soft First Touches.

achievements.description: Complete every activity at the Dead Man's Party wedding.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Complete all six optional and four mandatory wedding activities during Dead Man's Party.

guide.context: The wedding ends permanently when the quest advances, so finish the six unmarked optional events before the final mandatory sequence.

collectibles.name: Pigsty woman
collectibles.method: Speak with the seated woman beneath the tree.

collectibles.name: Dance
collectibles.method: Go onto the stage and dance.

collectibles.name: Dwarves
collectibles.method: Drink with the dwarves inside the tent.

collectibles.name: Pillow game
collectibles.method: Climb the exterior ladder and join the pillow activity.

collectibles.name: Barn-ladder woman
collectibles.method: Speak with the woman standing beside the ladder.

collectibles.name: Drinking table
collectibles.method: Drink with the women at the small table.

collectibles.name: Pig herding
collectibles.method: Guide two pigs into the marked pen.

collectibles.name: Gwent
collectibles.method: Play the wedding Gwent match; winning is unnecessary.

collectibles.name: Fire swallower
collectibles.method: Use Witcher Senses to find the missing fire swallower and his dog.

collectibles.name: Shoe fishing
collectibles.method: Dive into the pond, recover Shani's shoe, and return it to her.

achievements.description: Buy every auction lot at the Borsodi Auction House.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Win all three auction lots during Open Sesame! at the Borsodi Auction House.

guide.context: The auction cannot be repeated after the quest advances; carry enough crowns and bid until every lot is won.

collectibles.name: Count Romilly's figurine
collectibles.method: Keep bidding until Geralt wins the figurine.

collectibles.name: Starry Night Over the Pontar
collectibles.method: Keep bidding until Geralt wins the painting.

collectibles.name: Professor's spectacles
collectibles.method: Keep bidding until Geralt wins the spectacles.

achievements.description: Re-enact all of Iris von Everec's memories.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Restore all eight of Iris's memories during Scenes From a Marriage.

guide.context: The gazebo tableau sits beside the entry point and is the easiest memory to walk past; entering the final nightmare fight closes the search.

steps.text: Create a manual save upon entering the painted world, restore the gazebo memory first, then use Witcher Senses in every highlighted scene to place its missing objects through the final dining-room tableau.
After the dining-room memory has played, confirm that all eight memories are complete before advancing to the nightmare fight and leaving the painted world.

achievements.description: Finish the Hearts of Stone story.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Complete Whatsoever a Man Soweth and finish Hearts of Stone.

guide.context: Either final decision concerning Olgierd and Gaunter O'Dimm awards the story completion.

steps.text: Finish Olgierd's three wishes, complete Scenes From a Marriage, meet Gaunter O'Dimm at the temple, resolve the final choice, and finish Whatsoever a Man Soweth.

achievements.description: Provoke every Iris nightmare at once and win.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Awaken all six Iris von Everec nightmares and defeat them in one fight.

guide.context: Killing a dormant nightmare before all six are active invalidates the attempt; make a manual save before the final Scenes From a Marriage battle.

steps.text: When the nightmare fight begins, strike each of the five dormant figures once with a light attack while keeping the original alive.
After all six nightmares are moving and attacking, defeat the entire group by any method.

achievements.description: Kill 3 opponents with their own arrows.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill three archers with their own reflected arrows.

guide.context: Arrow Deflection rank three returns parried arrows; the arrow must deliver the killing blow.

steps.text: Unlock all three ranks of Arrow Deflection, weaken an archer, face the incoming shot, parry immediately before impact, and repeat until reflected arrows kill three opponents.

achievements.description: Be under the influence of seven potions or decoctions at the same time.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Have seven potion or decoction effects active simultaneously.

guide.context: Geralt needs enough maximum Toxicity to survive seven overlapping effects; Acquired Tolerance and Metabolic Control increase capacity.

steps.text: Equip toxicity-increasing abilities, prepare seven low-toxicity potions or compatible decoctions, drink them rapidly before any effect expires, and keep all seven icons active together.

achievements.description: Destroy and loot every Order of the Flaming Rose camp.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Clear and loot all eight Order of the Flaming Rose camps in northeastern Velen.

guide.context: A camp counts only after its hostile knights are dead and its marked chest has been looted.

steps.text: Visit each of the eight Order camps added by Hearts of Stone, kill every hostile knight, use Witcher Senses to locate the guarded chest, and loot all eight chests.

achievements.displayName: I Wore Ofieri Before It Was Cool
achievements.description: Collect all available Ofieri armor and horse gear, and at least one Ofieri sword.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Own all four Ofieri armor pieces, all three Ofieri horse-gear pieces, and at least one Ofieri sword.

guide.context: Complete From Ofier's Distant Shores for the armor diagrams, then obtain the saddle, blinders, saddlebags, and sword from the Ofieri merchant beside the Runewright at Upper Mill.

collectibles.name: Ofieri scale armor
collectibles.method: Recover the diagram and have an armorer craft the chest piece.

collectibles.name: Ofieri sharovary
collectibles.method: Recover the diagram and craft the trousers.

collectibles.name: Ofieri gauntlets
collectibles.method: Recover the diagram and craft the gauntlets.

collectibles.name: Ofieri boots
collectibles.method: Recover the diagram and craft the boots.

collectibles.name: Ofieri stock saddle
collectibles.method: Ask the merchant about his horse and win Races: Swift as the Western Winds.

collectibles.name: Ofieri horse blinders
collectibles.method: Buy the Ofieri blinders from the merchant.

collectibles.name: Ofieri saddlebags
collectibles.method: Buy the Ofieri saddlebags from the merchant.

collectibles.name: Ofieri sword
collectibles.method: Buy the Ofieri decorated saber and keep it with every armor and horse-gear piece.

achievements.description: Kill 20 cows.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Kill 20 cows.

guide.context: Cows at Martin Feuille's Farmstead respawn after meditation, allowing the counter to be completed in one place.

steps.text: Travel to Martin Feuille's Farmstead north of Novigrad, kill the herd, meditate until cows respawn, and continue until 20 kills register.

achievements.description: Slide downhill continuously for 10 seconds.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Slide downhill continuously for at least 10 seconds.

guide.context: The mountains beside the Distillery signpost in eastern Ard Skellig provide a long uninterrupted slope.

steps.text: Save at the Distillery signpost, sprint onto the steep snow slope, allow Geralt to slide without jumping or colliding, and remain sliding for 10 seconds.

achievements.description: Win a round of gwent with a total strength of at least 187.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Win a Gwent round with at least 187 total strength.

guide.context: The 187 points must be visible on Geralt's side in one round; Northern Realms siege units, Tight Bond, Commander's Horn, and spies make the total practical.

steps.text: Build a high-strength deck, use spies to draw extra cards, save siege units and multipliers for one round, reach at least 187 displayed strength, and win that round.

achievements.description: Travel to the Duchy of Toussaint.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Travel to Toussaint through Envoys, Wineboys.

guide.context: The Blood and Wine invitation appears after rescuing Dandelion and can also be started from a notice board.

steps.text: Read the Envoys, Wineboys notice, meet Palmerin and Milton at Holloway, defeat the bandits, accept the journey, and arrive in Toussaint.

achievements.description: Be decorated with the Order of Vitis Vinifera.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Earn the Order of Vitis Vinifera by completing a successful Blood and Wine ending.

guide.context: A manual save before the Little Flint Girl lets the ribbon branch be paired with Kling of the Clink without replaying the expansion.

steps.text: During The Night of Long Fangs choose to free Syanna and enter Beyond Hill and Dale; at the snowy village, win Gwent against the Little Flint Girl or pay 500 crowns for the protective ribbon.
Finish the story with Syanna alive and complete the ceremony where the duchess awards the Order.

achievements.description: Serve time in Toussaint.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Serve time in Toussaint by completing the prison ending.

guide.context: This conflicts with Last Action Hero on the same timeline; reload a manual save made before speaking with the Little Flint Girl.

steps.text: During The Night of Long Fangs choose to free Syanna and enter Beyond Hill and Dale, but do not speak with the Little Flint Girl or obtain the ribbon.
Finish the story after Syanna dies and complete the prison sequence.

achievements.description: Obtain a flawless victory in all the competitions during the knights' tourney.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Win the five tourney competitions and complete The Warble of a Smitten Knight.

guide.context: After following Vivienne into the woods, choosing to withdraw ends the route; select Wanna finish the tourney and continue.

collectibles.name: Crossbow target shooting
collectibles.method: Win the opening target event.

collectibles.name: Horse race
collectibles.method: Pass the required targets and finish first.

collectibles.name: Mounted duel
collectibles.method: Accept Prince Anséis's challenge and win.

collectibles.name: Five-versus-five arena
collectibles.method: Defeat the opposing team.

collectibles.name: Champion duel
collectibles.method: Choose Wanna finish the tourney and defeat the final champion.

achievements.description: Be given Aerondight by the Lady of the Lake.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Demonstrate compassion, generosity, honor, valor, and wisdom, then claim Aerondight.

guide.context: Only one qualifying act per virtue is required; the listed early choices provide a compact, auditable route.

collectibles.name: Compassion
collectibles.method: Spare the shaelmaar after the arena fight.

collectibles.name: Generosity
collectibles.method: Give the letter-delivery child five crowns.

collectibles.name: Honor
collectibles.location: The Warble of a Smitten Knight
collectibles.method: Register for the tourney as Geralt of Rivia, then accept and win the mounted duel with Prince Anséis.

collectibles.name: Valor
collectibles.location: The Warble of a Smitten Knight
collectibles.method: Choose Wanna finish the tourney and win the remaining events.

collectibles.name: Wisdom
collectibles.method: Investigate the spotted wight and lift the curse instead of attacking.

collectibles.name: Aerondight
collectibles.method: Track There Can Be Only One, defeat the hermit after all five virtues are recognized, and receive the Lady of the Lake's silver-sword reward.

achievements.description: Use all available options for developing Corvo Bianco.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Purchase every available Corvo Bianco renovation.

guide.context: The house, grounds, stable, guest room, laboratory, garden, and display improvements cost about 15,000 crowns and require waiting for construction.

steps.text: Speak with Majordomo Barnabas-Basil at Corvo Bianco, buy every renovation and furnishing option, meditate for each work period, and return until no upgrade dialogue remains.

achievements.description: Find all grandmaster diagrams for each witcher school.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Find all 30 Grandmaster diagrams: six each for the Manticore, Ursine, Feline, Griffin, and Wolven schools.

guide.context: Only diagram discovery is required; crafting all five sets is unnecessary for this achievement.

collectibles.name: Manticore
collectibles.method: Complete the Grandmaster Manticore scavenger hunt and collect its armor, trousers, boots, gauntlets, steel-sword, and silver-sword diagrams.

collectibles.name: Ursine
collectibles.method: Complete the Grandmaster Ursine scavenger hunt and collect its armor, trousers, boots, gauntlets, steel-sword, and silver-sword diagrams.

collectibles.name: Feline
collectibles.method: Complete the Grandmaster Feline scavenger hunt and collect its armor, trousers, boots, gauntlets, steel-sword, and silver-sword diagrams.

collectibles.name: Griffin
collectibles.method: Complete the Grandmaster Griffin scavenger hunt and collect its armor, trousers, boots, gauntlets, steel-sword, and silver-sword diagrams.

collectibles.name: Wolven
collectibles.method: Complete the Grandmaster Wolven scavenger hunt and collect its armor, trousers, boots, gauntlets, steel-sword, and silver-sword diagrams.

achievements.description: Collect all the cards in the Skellige deck.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Collect every card in the Skellige Gwent deck and complete Gwent: Never Fear, Skellige's Here.

guide.context: The Toussaint quest tracks these cards and marks remaining owners; base-game cards are not part of this deck achievement.

steps.text: Read Beauclair notice boards, speak with the tournament organizer to start Gwent: Never Fear, Skellige's Here, buy or win every marked Skellige card, and return when the deck is complete.

achievements.description: Unite the vineyards and receive a wine named in Geralt's honor.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Unite Liam and Matilda's vineyards and receive a wine named for Geralt.

guide.context: Completing Vermentino or Coronata before exposing the sabotage gives Belgaard to one owner and permanently blocks the joint-wine outcome.

steps.text: At Plegmund's Bridge begin both Coronata and Vermentino, read the sabotage notes at Coronata objective two and Vermentino objective three, then finish The Deus in the Machina before reporting either vineyard complete.
Return to both owners, complete Wine Wars: Consorting and Belgaard, wait three days, and accept the named wine.

achievements.description: Unlock the bonus for equipping all the witcher gear elements from one School.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Equip all six pieces of one Grandmaster witcher-school set at the same time.

guide.context: The set bonus activates only when the matching armor, trousers, boots, gauntlets, steel sword, and silver sword are all equipped.

steps.text: Collect one school's six Grandmaster diagrams, have Lazare Lafargue craft every piece, equip the full matching set, and leave the inventory screen.

achievements.description: Develop a mutation.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Unlock the mutation system and research any mutation.

guide.context: Turn and Face the Strange opens the Mutations panel; the achievement requires spending ability points and Greater Mutagens on a node, not merely finishing the quest.

steps.text: Read Yennefer or Triss's letter, complete Turn and Face the Strange in Professor Moreau's laboratory, open Character and Mutations, select an available mutation, pay its listed ability-point and Greater Mutagen cost, and confirm research.

achievements.description: Kill a frozen opponent with a crossbow bolt.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete when its requirements are available.
achievements.summary: Freeze an opponent with Northern Wind and kill the frozen target with a crossbow bolt.

guide.context: The bolt must deliver the final damage while the freeze is active; a low-level bandit prevents the bomb from killing the target first.

steps.text: Craft Northern Wind, weaken a low-level bandit at Devil's Pit, throw the bomb until the target freezes solid, then immediately fire the killing crossbow bolt.

achievements.description: Kill Golyat with a crossbow bolt to the eye.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 5; complete before its route closes.
achievements.summary: Kill Golyat with a crossbow bolt through the eye opening in his barrel helmet.

guide.context: Golyat appears once at the start of Toussaint, so make a manual save before the fight and reload if another source delivers the kill.

steps.text: During The Beast of Toussaint, weaken Golyat, aim through the narrow central gap in the barrel helmet, and make the finishing hit a crossbow bolt to the eye.
